sections.paragraph:
Γαλλίων, ωνος, ὁ Gallio (Prosopogr. Imp. Rom. II p. 237; Tacit., Annal. 15, 73 Junius Gallio, Senecae frater) proconsul of Achaia 51/52, Ac 18:12, 14, 17. For the ins relating to him SIG 801D; MPlassart, Fouilles de Delphes III/4, 286; JOliver, Hesperia 40, ’71, 239–40.—ADeissmann, Paulus2 1925, 203–25 (lit., esp. p. 210f; Eng. tr. Paul2 1926, 261–86); LHennequin, Dict. de la Bible, Suppl. II ’34, 355–73; MGoguel, RHPR 12, ’32, 321–33; Haenchen, index; DSlingerland, JBL 110, ’91, 439–49, and rejoinder by JMurphy-O’Connor, Paul and Gallio: JBL 112, ’93, 315–17 (lit.); Boffo, Iscrizioni no. 29 (lit.); Hemer, Acts 251–53; SEG XLII, 474 (lit.); Kl. Pauly II 686; BHHW I 512f.—M-M.

ins Ins, ins = Inscription, Inschrift, inscription(s). Without a period, esp. in lists, as at the beginning of entries; the capitalized form is used in titles. In conjunction with literary works this abbr. refers to the title or description of contents.

SIG SIG = Sylloge Inscriptionum Graecarum3; superscript omitted in text—List 3

lit. lit. = literal(ly); literature (refererences to [scholarly] literature)

esp. esp. = especially

Eng. tr. Eng. tr. = English translation

Suppl.

Suppl. = Supplement (to serials)

suppl. = supplement, supplied (in grammatical references)

RHPR RHPR = Revue d’histoire et de philosophie religieuses—List 6

Haenchen Haenchen = EH., Commentary on Acts—List 6

JBL JBL = Journal of Biblical Literature—List 6

Boffo, Boffo, Iscrizioni = LB., Iscrizioni greche e latine—List 3

Hemer, Acts Hemer, Acts = CH., The Book of Acts in the Setting of Hellenistic History—List 6

SEG SEG = Supplementum Epigraphicum Graecum—List 3

Kl. Pauly Kl. Pauly = Der Kleine Pauly: Lexikon der Antike—List 6

BHHW BHHW = Biblisch-historisches Handwörterbuch—List 6

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 187
